expertGuides.title: Search-friendly answers for California insurance questions
expertGuides.description: We are building the site around clear, first-party guidance instead of stuffing keywords into the homepage. Start with the question you actually need answered.

coverageEvaluation.heading: Concerned about gaps in coverage?
coverageEvaluation.body: We'll look at your current insurance for free — whether it's personal or business. Send us your policy paperwork and we'll check for gaps, overlaps, and ways to save. No commitment needed.
coverageEvaluation.emailBody:
Hi Brahm,

I'd like a free evaluation of my current policy. I've attached it here.

Thank you!

about.metaDescription: Meet the bilingual team at Allsberry Insurance Agency. 10 licensed agents — including Spanish-speaking staff — helping Southern California families and businesses protect what matters most.
about.heading: Local guidance, clean communication, and coverage that fits real life.
about.intro: Allsberry Insurance Agency has served Southern California since 1994. Erin has led the agency since 2009 with a simple belief: insurance should feel tailored, understandable, and genuinely helpful.

clarity.title: Clear options
clarity.description: Coverage choices explained in plain language so the best fit is easy to understand.

responsiveness.title: Tailored advice
responsiveness.description: Recommendations shaped around your household, vehicles, business, and long-term goals.

localExpertise.title: Local context
localExpertise.description: An agency that knows Southern California growth, local markets, and the realities behind California insurance decisions.

teamSection.title: The people clients actually work with
teamSection.description: Insurance works best when you know who you are working with. Here are the people behind your coverage.

faqs.heading: A few practical questions before you reach out

q1.question: How long has Allsberry Insurance Agency served Southern California?
q1.answer: The agency has served the area since 1994, with Erin leading the business since 2009 and continuing the same local, personal approach.

q2.question: What kinds of coverage do you help with?
q2.answer: The team helps with home, auto, renters, life, umbrella, condo, and commercial coverage, plus the proof-of-insurance requests that come with real-world policy management.

q3.question: Who do I talk to if I want to start a quote?
q3.answer: You can start online or reach out directly. The team will route you to the right licensed agent based on what you need and how quickly you need help.

contact.metaDescription: Contact Allsberry Insurance Agency for home, auto, life, and business insurance guidance across Southern California. Call, email, or start your quote online.
contact.heading: Reach the Allsberry team
contact.subheading: Call us, email us, or jump straight into a quote.
contact.serviceAreaBody: Serving {area} by phone, email, and online
contact.fastHelpBody: The quote flow is the quickest way to tell us what you need. Pick a product and a licensed agent will follow up within one business day.

faqs.heading: Contact questions we hear most often
faqs.description: These answers make the page more useful for visitors and give search engines and AI systems clearer context about how the agency works.

q1.question: What is the fastest way to reach the Allsberry team?
q1.answer: Calling the office is the quickest path when something is time-sensitive. If it is not urgent, the quote or proof-of-insurance form usually gives the team the cleanest context to respond quickly.

q2.question: How quickly will someone follow up after I reach out?
q2.answer: A licensed team member typically follows up within one business day, and straightforward requests are often reviewed sooner.

q3.question: Can I use this contact page for quotes and proof requests too?
q3.answer: Yes. The contact page is a good starting point, but the quote flow and proof-of-insurance flow are faster when you already know what you need.

quote.heading: Start simple. We'll handle the details with you.

quote.next1: We review the products you selected.

faqs.heading: Quote questions we can answer before you even submit
faqs.description: These are the real questions people ask before they start a quote, which also makes this page easier for search engines and AI answer engines to interpret.

q1.question: What information should I have ready before I request a quote?
q1.answer: The basics help most: the type of insurance you need, your ZIP code, and any context about your home, vehicles, business, or current policy. If you are not sure, start anyway and the team can guide the next step.

q2.question: How fast will someone follow up after I submit the quote form?
q2.answer: A licensed Allsberry team member follows up within one business day, and straightforward requests are often reviewed sooner.

q3.question: Should I use this page if I only need proof or a certificate of insurance?
q3.answer: No. Use the dedicated proof-of-insurance request flow for COIs, escrow requests, and mortgagee updates so the team can route documentation faster.

evidenceOfInsurance.heading: Need evidence of coverage fast?
evidenceOfInsurance.subheading: Use this request flow for certificates of insurance, escrow or mortgage requests, and proof of coverage follow-up.
evidenceOfInsurance.helpBullet1: Tell us who needs the proof.
evidenceOfInsurance.helpBullet2: Add a due date if escrow or underwriting is waiting on it.
evidenceOfInsurance.helpBullet3: Include any loan, property, or certificate notes you already have.

faqs.heading: Documentation questions we can answer right here
faqs.description: This page now matches the FAQ schema with visible answers, which is cleaner for users and safer for search engines.

q1.question: Can I request proof of insurance online?
q1.answer: Yes. Share the basics here and the agency can follow up with the right evidence of insurance, COI details, or mortgagee update.

q2.question: What kinds of documentation can Allsberry Insurance Agency help with?
q2.answer: The team can help with evidence of insurance, certificates of insurance, escrow or closing requests, and mortgagee or loss payee updates.

q3.question: What helps the team turn around my request faster?
q3.answer: Include who needs the document, any due date, and any mortgagee, escrow, property, or certificate notes you already have so the request can be routed cleanly.

home.name: Home Insurance
home.description: Protect your home, belongings, and peace of mind with dependable coverage.

auto.name: Auto Insurance
auto.description: Protection for your car, your daily drive, and the surprises on the road.

renters.name: Renters Insurance
renters.description: Affordable protection for your stuff. It also helps pay for a place to stay if your rental can't be lived in.

life.name: Life Insurance
life.description: Helps take care of the people you love if something happens to you. Getting started is quick, safe, and private.

umbrella.name: Umbrella Insurance
umbrella.description: Extra protection that helps pay for big costs your other insurance doesn't fully cover.

condo.name: Condo Insurance
condo.description: Covers what's inside your condo. Your building's insurance protects the outside, but you need your own plan for your stuff and walls.

general-liability.name: General Liability
general-liability.description: Pays for costs if a customer gets hurt at your business, something gets broken, or someone sues you.

workers-comp.name: Workers Compensation
workers-comp.description: Helps pay for medical bills and lost wages if an employee gets hurt on the job. Required by California law for most businesses.

commercial-property.name: Commercial Property
commercial-property.description: Protects your building, equipment, and the things you need to run your business every day.

commercial-auto.name: Commercial Auto
commercial-auto.description: Covers the cars and trucks your business uses, including your drivers and the things you carry.

professional-liability.name: Professional Liability
professional-liability.description: Helps pay the costs if a client says your work or advice caused them to lose money, even if it was an honest mistake.

specialty-coverage.name: Specialty Coverage
specialty-coverage.description: For things that don't fit a normal plan, like special equipment, unique businesses, or unusual properties.

business.name: Business Insurance
business.description: One package that puts together the different types of insurance your business needs.

other.name: Other Coverage
other.description: Tell us what you need and we will point you in the right direction.

seamless.title: Seamless Experience
seamless.description: We walk you through every step, follow up fast, and make getting covered simple.

personalized.title: Personalized Coverage
personalized.description: We build a plan around your life — your home, your car, your business, and your future.

expert.title: Expert Advice
expert.description: Our team gives you straight answers so you can pick the right plan.

topRated.title: Top-Rated Support
topRated.description: We're here before, during, and after you file a claim. You won't have to figure things out alone.

q1.question: What types of insurance can Allsberry Insurance Agency help me quote?
q1.answer: We help people in Southern California compare insurance for their home, car, rental, condo, business, employees, life, and more.

q2.question: How fast will someone follow up after I request a quote?
q2.answer: A licensed team member will get back to you within one business day. If your request is simple and we have the info we need, it's often even faster.

q3.question: Can you help with evidence of insurance or certificates of insurance?
q3.answer: Yes. If your bank, landlord, or another company needs proof that you have insurance, we can send them the right paperwork quickly.

q4.question: Do I need to bundle home and auto insurance to work with the agency?
q4.answer: No. Combining your insurance can sometimes save money, but we're happy to help with just one type of insurance if that's all you need.

q5.question: Is my data private and secure?
q5.answer: Yes. Your phone calls, texts, and emails with us are all protected. We never share your personal information without your permission. You can read more about how we protect your data through the Farmers privacy center.

classicCars.name: Classic car collector
classicCars.body: I am happy and confident having all my personal, family, and business insurance needs taken care of with the team here. Anytime I call with a question or a need they are happy to help and treat me like I am a top priority. Recently Erin was able to also help me in a big way — I have a few classic cars and to my surprise she was able to get my cars insured through Hagerty with great coverage.

homeowner.name: Corona homeowner
homeowner.body: The whole team made switching our home insurance simple. They walked us through every step and found a plan that actually fit our family. No pressure, just honest advice.

restaurant.name: Local restaurant owner
restaurant.body: Brahm handled our business coverage from day one. He was organized, answered every question, and helped us figure out what we actually needed versus what we could skip. Highly recommend.

auto.name: Auto insurance client
auto.body: First time I ever felt like someone actually looked at my auto policy instead of just renewing it. The advice was practical and I ended up with better coverage for less.

home.headline: Show us where you are in the home process.
home.description: Buying a home? Refinancing? Need paperwork for your lender? Pick the path that fits your situation.
home.reason3: Proof for your bank or closing

auto.headline: Pick the auto path that matches your situation.
auto.description: Most people shopping for auto insurance want one of three things: a lower price, help adding or removing a driver, or quick proof of coverage.
auto.reason3: ID cards or proof for your bank

renters.headline: Renters coverage should feel fast, affordable, and clean.
renters.description: Most renters are either moving in, combining with auto insurance, or getting proof for their landlord.

life.headline: Life coverage starts with who you are protecting.
life.description: Your privacy comes first. We only see what we need to help you — never your full personal details. The process is quick and simple.
life.reason3: Review a plan you already have

umbrella.headline: Umbrella coverage is about protecting the gaps most people miss.
umbrella.description: Umbrella insurance adds extra protection on top of your home and auto plans. It helps cover big costs your other insurance might not fully handle.
umbrella.reason1: Extra protection on top of your other plans
umbrella.reason2: Homes, rentals, or more to protect
umbrella.reason3: Make sure all your plans work together

business.headline: Start with the business situation, not just the policy name.
business.description: Business insurance is easier when we start with how your company works, not just a list of policy names.
business.reason2: Proof of insurance for others you work with
business.reason3: Changes to staff, vehicles, or property
